subject: Explore project context
description: Check existing files, docs, and project structure in /Users/user/git/cyber

subject: Ask clarifying questions
description: Understand purpose, constraints, success criteria for the LLM benchmark monitoring harness

subject: Propose 2-3 approaches
description: Present different architectural approaches with trade-offs and recommendation

subject: Present design
description: Present design sections incrementally, get user approval

subject: Spec self-review
description: Check for placeholders, contradictions, ambiguity, scope issues

subject: User reviews written spec
description: User reviews and approves the spec before implementation planning

subject: Transition to implementation
description: Invoke writing-plans skill to create implementation plan
